match.userMessage:
Slow dolly forward on the hands as fingers twist the lipstick base. The coral bullet rises steadily, a shaft of morning light striking the tip and sliding a pink reflection across the knuckles.
Gentle light continues shifting across skin and white tabletop.

quiet morning room tone with soft natural light ambiance. subtle mechanical click of lipstick twisting mechanism.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
